test_n_features_deprecation
z9Check warning raised for max_features="auto" deprecation.r%
auto)
`max_features='auto'` has been deprecated in 1.1 and will be removed in 1.3. To keep the past behaviour, explicitly set `max_features=(1.0|'sqrt')` or remove this parameter as it is also the default value for RandomForest(Regressors|Classifiers) and ExtraTrees(Regressors|Classifiers)\.r
test_max_features_deprecation
